priceCalculatorPage.subtitle: Compare driver tariff vs benchmarks and run tariff health checks for corporate clients.
priceCalculatorPage.roleDisabledNote: Tariff Health Check is disabled for your role. Ask an Admin to enable this action in Access management.

transcripts.intro: Upload a spreadsheet with column A = pickup address, B = drop-off address, C = trip date and time. The CRM geocodes addresses, routes with Google (traffic at departure time), and prices the trip with the selected MOT client tariff vs the Yango Drivers formula.
transcripts.sameMapsKeyAsRequestRides: Uses the same GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY as Request Rides: enable Geocoding API + Routes API on that Google Cloud project (batch geocode + traffic-aware routes).
transcripts.addressLanguagesNote: Point A and B may be written in English, Russian, or Hebrew — the geocoder detects the script per cell (same behavior as Request Rides).
transcripts.pastTripsRoutingNote: Trip times in the past: Google does not allow traffic modeling for historical departure times. Those rows use traffic-unaware routing (road distance and typical travel time without congestion at that moment).
transcripts.mapsKeyMissing: Routing unavailable: add GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY (Geocoding API + Routes API enabled on that GCP project).
transcripts.selectTariffAndFile: Choose a tariff and upload a file with at least one trip row.
transcripts.rowErrorsNote: Some rows failed geocoding or routing; see the Error column.

decouplingModal.title: Tariff suggestions for target decoupling
decouplingModal.hintClickTotalPct: Click to explore tariff variants toward a target portfolio decoupling %.
decouplingModal.targetPctHint: Uses the same trips as in the table (successful rows only). Driver totals stay fixed; client prices are simulated from suggested MOT rules.
decouplingModal.deterministicBanner: These suggestions use deterministic uniform scaling (same structure as your tariff; boarding and km rates scaled together). AI variants are unavailable — numbers below are still simulated on your trips.

preOrdersPage.mapNoCoordinates: No map points available (Point A coordinates are missing).
preOrdersPage.mapLegend: Blue pins = pre-orders, orange dots = active drivers (fake simulation)
